hero.title: Full-Stack Software Development
hero.subtitle: We help organizations transform digitally with custom software, web applications, and mobile apps — purpose-built to solve real problems, reduce costs, and improve operational efficiency.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: End-to-end software solutions tailored to your needs

process.title: Our Process
process.subtitle: Systematic, transparent, and delivered on schedule

items.title: Consult & Analyze
items.description: We dig deep to understand your problems and goals, then craft the optimal strategy before writing a single line of code.

items.title: Design & Plan
items.description: Wireframes, UX/UI design, and system architecture — all planned and approved before development begins.

items.title: Develop
items.description: Built with modern tech stacks, clean code, and weekly progress reports so you always know where we stand.

items.title: Test & QA
items.description: Every feature tested for performance, security, and UX — meeting international standards before deployment.

items.title: Deploy & Support
items.description: Production deployment with documentation and team training, plus ongoing maintenance and technical support.

why.title: Why Choose KNT Technology
why.subtitle: We combine technical expertise with business understanding

items.title: Custom Solutions
items.description: Every business is unique. We build software specifically tailored to your workflow and goals.

items.title: Modern Tech Stack
items.description: We use proven, modern technologies to deliver scalable and maintainable software.

items.title: On-Time Delivery
items.description: We respect your timeline and deliver projects on schedule without compromising quality.

items.title: Long-Term Partnership
items.description: We provide ongoing support and maintenance to grow with your business.

cta.title: Ready to Take Your Business to the Next Level?
cta.subtitle: Get a free consultation with our experts — we'll analyze your needs and propose the right solution for you.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive software development and IT solutions for modern enterprises

items.title: Web Application Development
items.description: Turn your business ideas into reality with scalable, fast, and secure web applications — built to international standards.

items.title: Mobile App Development
items.description: Deliver smooth mobile experiences to your customers on iOS and Android, using Native or Cross-platform — whichever fits best.

items.title: Custom Software & ERP
items.description: Speed up and simplify your operations with custom software and ERP systems designed around your actual workflows.

items.title: System Integration
items.description: Connect fragmented systems seamlessly, eliminate duplicate data entry, and save your team's time across the organization.

items.title: Cloud Solutions
items.description: Move your systems to the cloud for flexibility, reliability, and long-term cost savings — across AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud.

items.title: Maintenance & Support
items.description: Keep your software running smoothly 24/7. Our technical team responds quickly to issues and keeps your tech stack up-to-date.

story.title: Our Story
story.content: KNT Technology Co., Ltd. helps businesses leverage technology to achieve their goals. We are a team of passionate software engineers, designers, and consultants dedicated to building software that makes a real difference and delivers maximum value to your work.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: To drive our partners' digital transformation through innovative software that solves real problems, reduces costs, and sustainably improves operational efficiency.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.content: To be the trusted technology partner for organizations across Thailand and Southeast Asia, building software that creates long-term value for their business.

items.title: Quality First
items.description: We never compromise on the quality of our work.

items.title: Client Success
items.description: Your success is our success. We're invested in your growth.

items.title: Innovation
items.description: We embrace new technologies to deliver better solutions.

items.title: Transparency
items.description: Clear communication and honest relationships with every client.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Let's discuss how we can help your business

footer.tagline: Building software that drives your business forward.
